title: Tsalmonah #6758
definition:
Zalmonah = "shady"

 1) a station of Israel during the wilderness wanderings located on
    the east side of Edom
nasbUsage:

 1) a station of Israel during the wilderness wanderings located on
    the east side of Edom

    NASB:  a place in the desert
